title: RC Underwater Exploration Drone
description: 6-thruster ROV with ArduSub/Pixhawk, BlueRobotics T200 thrusters, 1080p video via Ethernet tether, depth sensor, and IP68 pressure housing for inspection to 30 m depth.
objective: 30 m depth rating; 1080p live video; depth hold and heading hold; 4-direction thrust; 30 min mission time.
constraints: 14.8 V 10 Ah Li-Ion; 30 m Cat6 tether; IP68 100 mm aluminium housing; BOM < ₹25 000.
supporting_fact_titles: Underwater Thruster — Hydrodynamic Thrust and Propulsion
design_element_titles: RC Underwater ROV — Thruster Array and Waterproof Electronics

element_usage_notes.RC Underwater ROV — Thruster Array and W: 6× T200 thrusters; ArduSub on Pixhawk; MS5837-30BA depth sensor; 30 m tether.
element_usage_notes.Waterproof IP67 Marine Enclosure Design: IP68 100 mm aluminium tube; dual O-ring end caps; rated to 30 m (3 bar).
